title: Whisked Australian Chicken Stir-fry
description: A fresh, crunchy, indulgent dish featuring chicken stock and a unique whisk ingredient for an authentic yet vegan-friendly twist.

ingredients.name: Rice Noodles
ingredients.notes: Look for gluten-free options if needed

ingredients.name: Vegan Egg (Whisked)
ingredients.notes: Replace with aquafaba or almond milk for a vegan version

ingredients.name: Vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, carrots, onions, broccoli), finely chopped
Garlic
ingredients.notes: Minced for added depth of flavor

instructions: In a large saucepan, combine chicken stock and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 10 minutes to concentrate the flavors.
While the broth is cooking, whisk together vegan egg (or aquafaba/almond milk) in a separate bowl until it forms stiff peaks. Set aside.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add oil, followed by chopped vegetables and garlic. Stir-fry for about 3-4 minutes until the vegetables are just tender.
Add whisked vegan egg (or aquafaba/almond milk) to the pan with stirring continuously to avoid clumping. Allow the mixture to cook for another minute or so until it starts to set slightly.
Gradually add the simmering broth into the wok, while continuing to stir-fry and adjusting heat as needed. The goal is to incorporate the liquid without breaking up the egg mixture.
Combine rice noodles with the stir-fried vegetables and egg mixture in the pan. Cook for about 2-3 minutes allowing the rice noodles to absorb some of the broth’s flavor.
Remove from heat, toss with chopped green onions, adjust seasoning if needed, then serve immediately.
